summary: Executed backend pytest suite and frontend Playwright integration tests for AI Estimate Pro core flows. All requested flows passed against public preview URL.
action_items: No blocking defects found in tested scope; keep regression coverage for chat and project listing to guard against schema regressions.
critical_code_review_comments: No critical code issues found in reviewed files for this scope.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed saved projects and chat messages through API/UI flows during test execution.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public endpoint tested: https://buildcalc-estimate.preview.emergentagent.com. Backend tests are at /app/backend/tests/test_api_core.py and pass with frontend .env exported before pytest. Chat persistence verified via page reload and history endpoint.
rca of the issue: No production issue reproduced in this cycle. Prior /api/projects legacy schema compatibility appears stable based on list/get/save API and UI save/list flows.
